title: UK Department for Transport Releases Electric Vehicle Charging Statistics for January 2026

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
The UK Department for Transport has published its quarterly statistics on public electric vehicle charging infrastructure for January 2026. The report details the number of public electric vehicle chargers across the United Kingdom, with data segmented by geography and charging power band.

This release highlights the ongoing efforts to monitor the growth of electric vehicle infrastructure, which is crucial for supporting the transition to sustainable transport solutions. As Scotland advocates for greener transport options, the enhancement of charging networks is particularly important for connecting communities, especially in the Highlands and Islands, where aviation has played a significant role since the inter-war period.
